mapper.sql: arr.id, arr.regimea_id, arr.regime_time_id, arr.attribute1, arr.attribute2, arr.attribute3, arr.enabled_flag, arr.create_by, arr.create_time, arr.update_by, arr.update_time

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.regimea_id as ${tAlias}_regimea_id, ${tAlias}.regime_time_id as ${tAlias}_regime_time_id, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time

select
,
,
from ac_regime_relation arr,ac_regime ar,ac_regime_time art
mapper.insert: insert into ac_regime_relation (regimea_id, regime_time_id, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{regimeaId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{regimeTimeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into ac_regime_relation (regimea_id, regime_time_id, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values
(#{item.regimeaId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.regimeTimeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update ac_regime_relation set regimea_id = #{regimeaId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, regime_time_id = #{regimeTimeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
